creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #7)

I await a response to a recent discreet enquiry about handing back my commit bit. It's a busy time, so be patient whilst things are formalised.

In the meantime: 

* please refrain from reassigning things – without question – 
  to my @freebsd.org identity.
